report.summary: Cycle 8 EOD: 2 new learn guides built (bear market investing + smart money signals), 356 uncommitted files (+12 from v7), 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable), 0 regressions, deploy still critical blocker

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages built this cycle verified: /learn/crypto-bear-market-investing-guide-2026 and /learn/smart-money-onchain-signals-guide-2026 — both have page.tsx files, metadata exports (title, description, OG), and are added to PUBLISH_QUEUE
594 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES config, 1,223 total page.tsx files in src/app — ~82% coverage of published slugs (103 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx)

145 TypeScript errors across 6 files (unchanged from prior cycles) — all JSX syntax issues (unescaped > characters) in: crypto-arbitrage-strategies, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison, structured-data.examples.ts. Non-blocking for production build

176 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE. 2 blocked items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx). 4 items ready to promote (DePIN, Gas Fees from last build + bear-market, smart-money from this build)
No regressions detected since last cycle. No new broken pages introduced

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6 core API routes verified in codebase: fear-greed (10min TTL), trending (5min TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (5min TTL), prices (60s TTL), defi-yields (5min TTL). All have in-memory cache + CDN s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate headers
All routes include fallback logic — serve stale cache on upstream failure (fear-greed, trending confirmed; others follow same pattern)
CoinGecko endpoints (trending, prices, market-dominance, market-metrics) rely on free tier — no API key observed in route files. Rate limiting risk remains if traffic scales
Health endpoint (/api/health) checks 3 services (coingecko-api, analytics, cache) but uses mock/random health checks — not real service pings. Flagging as tech debt
0/6 public API routes have request-level rate limiting applied (only /api/health has rate limiting via checkRateLimit). Production vulnerability carried forward
Network egress blocked from this environment — unable to perform live API health checks against degen0x.com. Code-level review only

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 batch deploy) — unchanged for 3 days. 356 uncommitted files (31 modified + 325 untracked), up +12 from last cycle
No new Vercel deploys possible without git push. All content built since Mar 25 (16+ pages today alone, 24+ OG images, schema fixes) remains invisible to production
CRITICAL: Deploy blocker now in 18th+ consecutive cycle. Every hour of delay = lost indexing time for time-sensitive content (F&G record streak, Morgan Stanley MSBT, SEC rulings)
TypeScript compilation succeeds (145 errors are all non-blocking JSX syntax). Build would likely succeed if committed and pushed
Unable to verify live Vercel deployment status due to network egress restrictions

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: build-6 created 2 new learn guides (crypto-bear-market-investing-guide-2026 at ~3,400 words, smart-money-onchain-signals-guide-2026 at ~3,600 words). Both SEO-optimized with Article + FAQ schemas, internal cross-links, and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE

CUMULATIVE TODAY (Mar 28): 6 build cycles shipped 16+ new pages, 8 standup rotations, 5 publish cycles, 7 design cycles, 9 community cycles, 8 EOD reviews. 228 tweets drafted cumulative. 38+ newsletter versions

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 — 356 uncommitted files need git commit + push to deploy. (2) P1 — 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security, restaking). (3) P1 — 4 queue items ready to promote (DePIN, Gas Fees, Bear Market, Smart Money). (4) P2 — 103 published slugs missing page.tsx. (5) P2 — 0/6 API routes rate-limited. (6) P3 — Health endpoint uses mock checks
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push (5 min action, highest leverage). One push unlocks 3 days of accumulated work for Google indexing
